notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Matt Chapman.

notableEvents.label: Ty France pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ty France triples (2) on a line drive to right fielder Jesus Rodriguez. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Ramón Laureano scores.

notableEvents.label: Ty France pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds out, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers.
